channel.title: binary search on 300.Watts
channel.description: Recent content in binary search on 300.Watts

item.title: Practicing bisect in Go
item.description: In Python, we are used to using bisect to search for elements in the List. In Go, sort.Search() can also provide us with the same purpose. As in Python, the target array is sorted before searching. (Teaching about Sort) arr := []int{9, 2, 1, 3, 6, 4, 5, 5} sort. Ints(arr) After sorting, we use sort.Search(), the first parameter is the search target, and the second is the function of the search condition.
